title: Book of Five Rings
description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Tracks cards added to your deck. Each time you add 5 cards total, you heal 20 HP and the counter resets.
